name: @prune/ttl-regression
description: List1 silent-ttl-regression-detector — flag a silent provider cache-TTL downgrade (e.g. a configured 1h tier that effectively behaves like 5m), which expires the prefix sooner than budgeted and re-bills the rewrite at the write multiplier. Deterministic comparison of the caller's CONFIGURED ttl vs the OBSERVED ttl (inferred by the host from cache-hit timing); insufficient_signal when either is unknown. Never fabricates a number, no regex, no model.
